problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: The key to What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? is Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus — specifically Polymer crosslinking under — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
